conflictOfInterest.details: The accountable principal also operates the lesson's authoring agent. The founding-stage quorum policy expressly permits one disclosed maintainer to operate isolated authoring and review agents; this was a fresh run that did not consult authoring conversation, existing review findings, or adjudication text, and the overlap did not prevent a responsible role-bounded verdict.

evidenceChecked: git rev-parse HEAD and GitHub PR #3 headRefOid both resolved to candidate 65450762bc08691c54f92238b4ba8cabe62f8b07 before review
lesson.json version 0.1.3: identity, ordered scenes, authorship and agent disclosure, CC-BY-4.0 license, files, source confidence, and empty thirdPartyAssets
content/010-orientation.md through content/090-synthesis.md: source order, headings, tables, text equivalents, recovery, boundaries, and nonvisual response routes
assessment.json: four mapped items, labelled response data, untimed after-attempt feedback, unlimited retakes, rubrics, answer logic, and equivalent text response paths
claims.json, glossary.json, references.json, and ATTRIBUTION.md: identity/version agreement, source use, rights basis/evidence, agent access, original-expression statement, and provenance
course/PREMED-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH.md and site/data/premed-graph.json at the candidate: declared source support, license scope, and exact local/remote Git blob 6386124d892244143baa05b6a006500ece7d429d

Manual current-reader test of PREM-LPP-001 in headless Chrome: keyboard Home/End and Enter navigation, visible focus, radio and ordering-response operation, labelled forms, live feedback, touch-capable context, and no runtime errors
Manual current-reader test at 390x844, synthetic 200% CSS zoom, prefers-reduced-motion, continuous reading mode, expanded attribution, and print mode with all 9 required scenes and 4 assessment items
Automated comparison of lesson scenes, assessment, glossary, and attribution against the declared source: manual synthesis review plus longest exact overlap of seven consecutive word tokens
npm run validate; npm test: 28 protocol tests and 19 browser tests passed, with 12 container-only tests skipped by their configured environment

findings.finding: The canonical order is meaningful and the core operation is equivalent across visual and nonvisual routes: hierarchy and dependency relations are stated in prose or table rows, important arrows are read in words, no answer depends on color, position, sound, motion, hover, dragging, drawing, or time, and assessment controls expose labelled keyboard-operable text or choice routes with status feedback. The current reader retained one scene-level H1, logical subordinate headings, visible focus, touch-sized controls, reduced motion, and complete print content during the checks performed.

The four complete SHA-256 digest strings are correctly present, but their unbroken inline-code rendering does not reflow when the attribution disclosure is expanded. At a 390-pixel viewport the disclosure was 306 pixels wide with a 652-pixel scroll width; at synthetic 200% zoom it was 326 pixels wide with a 691-pixel scroll width. The reader stage therefore requires horizontal scrolling to inspect the exact provenance strings. This is a bounded attribution-format defect: it does not remove the source values or block the lesson's learning operation, but it makes provenance inspection less usable for narrow-screen and magnified-text readers.
findings.resolution: Make long inline provenance identifiers wrap without changing their exact copyable value, for example by applying overflow-wrap: anywhere (with an appropriate word-break fallback) to rendered inline code in attribution content, then recheck the expanded disclosure at narrow width and 200% zoom.

findings.finding: The sole declared source is the project-owned Premed Knowledge Graph, its candidate-commit Git blob matches the remote repository object, its CC BY 4.0 scope is established by CONTENT-LICENSE.md, and the record supplies use, rights-basis evidence, dated agent-access status, and terms location. The pack declares no third-party assets, quotation, adaptation, media redistribution, or dataset extraction. Manual comparison found independently structured explanation, fictional cases, practice, transfer, and assessment; the automated overlap check found no passage longer than seven consecutive word tokens, consistent with facts-only original expression rather than close paraphrase.

Accountable author and material-agent provenance are complete and attested, the admissions boundary is explicit, Noor is plainly labelled fictional, and no identifiable learner or patient data is requested. The pack contains no asset, diagram, molecule, executable notebook, raw HTML, script, event handler, remote embed, unsafe TeX, path traversal, symlink, secret, copyrighted answer bank, or clinical-media dependency; deterministic active-content and path checks passed.

limitations: This is an accessibility, provenance, and project-policy evidence review, not legal advice; no jurisdiction-specific copyright, privacy, consent, or contract opinion was obtained.

Manual assistive-technology coverage used keyboard interaction, semantic roles/labels, heading inspection, focus behavior, a touch-capable browser context, and live-region feedback in headless Chrome; it did not include a representative human study or a full NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver, switch-control, or speech-input session.

The 200% check used browser CSS zoom as a reproducible approximation. The deterministic web reader and print CSS were available; PDF, EPUB, DOCX, JATS, and other planned non-web exporters were not implemented and could not be tested.

Rights checking covered the declared local source, its candidate-commit remote object, the repository license, and the pack's own expression. The dated agent-access statement remains the accountable contributor's attestation rather than a warranty from GitHub or a rights holder.

The instructions digest covers the exact user task plus the named discloseable repository instructions, role procedure, and required references; unavailable platform-level instructions are not represented in that digest.
